message:
test(terminal_writer): add 62 edge-case tests for accessors, helpers, enums, CountingWriter, cursor, gc (bd-m4n3r)

- Enum coverage: ScreenMode Default/Debug/Eq, UiAnchor Default/Debug
- Accessors: width/height, screen_mode, capabilities, pool, links, pool_and_links_mut
- into_inner: returns writer, performs cleanup with cursor restore
- take_render_buffer: new allocation, spare reuse, size mismatch fallback
- gc: with and without prev_buffer
- hide/show_cursor: emits sequences, idempotent (no duplicate on same state)
- Helper functions: sanitize_auto_bounds (zero min, max<min, both zero),
  diff_strategy_str, ui_anchor_str, json_escape (plain, special, control, unicode)
- CountingWriter: default no-count, enable/disable counting, take_count resets,
  write counts partial, flush, into_inner
- estimate_diff_scan_cost: Full/FullRedraw/DirtyRows paths (no_dirty, spans,
  no_spans, overflow, tile_skip, tile_fallback)
- InlineAuto: bounds accessor, clamped to terminal, None for non-auto,
  render_height_hint for altscreen/inline_fixed
- RuntimeDiffConfig: tile_skip_enabled, dirty_spans_enabled toggles
- present_ui: altscreen no cursor save/restore
- clear_screen: emits ED2
- set_size: clears spare_buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
